typeProperties.script:
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/MCPM/MCPM_Onshore_ProgressItems/MCPM_Onshore.csv']) ~> sourceMCPMOnshoreProgressItems
sourceMCPMOnshoreProgressItems derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/MCPM/MCPM_Onshore_ProgressItems/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'MCPM_Onshore_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkMCPMOnshoreProgressItemsRaw
